How many annual leave days do full-time: Full-time employees receive 18 working days of annual leave each calendar year (p. 1). Unused annual leave may be carried forward up to 5 working days into the next calendar year (p. 1).
What is the deadline for reimbursement c: Reimbursement claims must be submitted within 15 calendar days after the expense date (p. 4). Late claims may be denied unless the delay is explained and Finance approves the exception (p. 4).
Are meal reimbursements capped during ap: Yes. Meal reimbursement during approved travel is capped at 800 INR for breakfast, 1,200 INR for lunch, and 1,500 INR for dinner (p. 3).
